title: Review land management plans and strategies
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Review land management plans and strategies demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Determine mechanisms and criteria for reviewing land use, land management plans and strategies

pcs.text: Establish clear reasons for reviewing land use, land management plans and strategies

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Establish clear reasons for reviewing land use, land management plans and strategies.

pcs.text: Analyse data to determine internal policy and procedures that impact on land use, land management plans and strategies

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Interpret trends to identify changes occurring in land use, land management plans and strategies, beyond normal variations.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Regularly review industry information to establish the need for reviewing land use, land management plans, and strategies within the organisation.
